Bash(cd /Users/benlloyd/Desktop/REPO/mistralhack26/apps/server && uv run python -c "
import asyncio, httpx
from src.config import settings

ELEVENLABS_TTS_URL = 'https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/text-to-speech'

CALLERS = [
    {
        'file': 'assets/caller_1_spanish.mp3',
        'voice_id': 'pFZP5JQG7iQjIQuC4Bku',  # Lily - Spanish
        'text': '¡Ayuda! ¡Por favor, ayuda! Hubo un choque terrible en la calle Market con la Quinta. Mi esposo está atrapado en el carro. No puede salir. Hay humo saliendo del motor. ¡Por favor, manden una ambulancia rápido!',
    },
    {
        'file': 'assets/caller_2_mandarin.mp3',
        'voice_id': 'nPczCjzI2devNBz1zQrb',  # Brian - Chinese
        'text': '喂，我要报警。Market街和第五街路口发生了严重的车祸。我看到后座有一个小孩在哭。车里好像有两个人受伤了。路上到处都是碎片，请快点派人来。',
    },
    {
        'file': 'assets/caller_3_french.mp3',
        'voice_id': 'XB0fDUnXU5powFXDhCwa',  # Charlotte - French
        'text': \\"Allô, je suis le propriétaire du magasin en face. Il y a un accident grave sur Market Street. Je vois de la fumée qui sort du moteur, et maintenant je crois que ça prend feu! Il y a des gens qui essaient de sortir de la voiture. Envoyez les pompiers immédiatement!\\",
    },
]

async def generate\(client, caller\):
    r = await client.post\(
        f'{ELEVENLABS_TTS_URL}/{caller[\\"voice_id\\"]}',
        headers={'xi-api-key': settings.elevenlabs_api_key, 'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
        json={'text': caller['text'], 'model_id': 'eleven_turbo_v2_5', 'voice_settings': {'stability': 0.7, 'similarity_boost': 0.8}},
    \)
    r.raise_for_status\(\)
    with open\(caller['file'], 'wb'\) as f:
        f.write\(r.content\)
    print\(f'Created {caller[\\"file\\"]} \({len\(r.content\)} bytes\)'\)

async def main\(\):
    async with httpx.AsyncClient\(timeout=60.0\) as client:
        await asyncio.gather\(*[generate\(client, c\) for c in CALLERS]\)

asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
")

Bash(uv run python -c "
import asyncio, time, json
from src.services.media import extract_frame
from src.agents.vision_agent import analyze_frame
from src.config import settings
from mistralai import Mistral

async def test\(\):
    # 1. Extract frame from video
    t0 = time.time\(\)
    frame = await extract_frame\('assets/crash_video.mp4', timestamp_s=58\)
    print\(f'[{time.time\(\)-t0:.2f}s] Frame extracted: {len\(frame\)} bytes'\)

    # 2. Send to Mistral vision model
    client = Mistral\(api_key=settings.mistral_api_key\)
    t1 = time.time\(\)
    try:
        analysis = await asyncio.to_thread\(
            lambda: analyze_frame.__wrapped__\(client, frame, 1\) if hasattr\(analyze_frame, '__wrapped__'\) else None
        \)
        # analyze_frame is async, call it directly
        analysis = await analyze_frame\(client, frame, frame_id=1\)
        print\(f'[{time.time\(\)-t1:.2f}s] Vision analysis complete'\)
        print\(f'  Description: {analysis.overall_description}'\)
        print\(f'  Smoke: {analysis.smoke_visible}'\)
        print\(f'  Fire: {analysis.fire_visible}'\)
        print\(f'  Damage: {analysis.vehicle_damage_severity}'\)
        print\(f'  Detections: {[d.model_dump\(\) for d in analysis.detections]}'\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'[{time.time\(\)-t1:.2f}s] Vision FAILED: {e}'\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(uv run python -c "
import asyncio, time, json
from src.services.media import extract_frame
from src.agents.vision_agent import analyze_frame, compute_scene_delta
from src.config import settings
from mistralai import Mistral

async def test\(\):
    client = Mistral\(api_key=settings.mistral_api_key\)
    
    # Frame 1 at 58s \(should show smoke\)
    print\('=== Frame 1 \(t=58s\) ==='\)
    t0 = time.time\(\)
    frame1 = await extract_frame\('assets/crash_video.mp4', timestamp_s=58\)
    print\(f'[{time.time\(\)-t0:.2f}s] Extracted: {len\(frame1\):,} bytes'\)
    
    t1 = time.time\(\)
    analysis1 = await analyze_frame\(client, frame1, frame_id=1\)
    print\(f'[{time.time\(\)-t1:.2f}s] Vision analysis complete'\)
    print\(f'  Description: {analysis1.overall_description}'\)
    print\(f'  Smoke: {analysis1.smoke_visible}'\)
    print\(f'  Fire: {analysis1.fire_visible}'\)
    print\(f'  Damage: {analysis1.vehicle_damage_severity}'\)
    print\(f'  Detections: {[d.model_dump\(\) for d in analysis1.detections]}'\)
    
    # Frame 2 at 66s \(should show fire\)
    print\(\)
    print\('=== Frame 2 \(t=66s\) ==='\)
    t2 = time.time\(\)
    frame2 = await extract_frame\('assets/crash_video.mp4', timestamp_s=66\)
    print\(f'[{time.time\(\)-t2:.2f}s] Extracted: {len\(frame2\):,} bytes'\)
    
    t3 = time.time\(\)
    analysis2 = await analyze_frame\(client, frame2, frame_id=2\)
    print\(f'[{time.time\(\)-t3:.2f}s] Vision analysis complete'\)
    print\(f'  Description: {analysis2.overall_description}'\)
    print\(f'  Smoke: {analysis2.smoke_visible}'\)
    print\(f'  Fire: {analysis2.fire_visible}'\)
    print\(f'  Damage: {analysis2.vehicle_damage_severity}'\)
    print\(f'  Detections: {[d.model_dump\(\) for d in analysis2.detections]}'\)
    
    # Scene delta
    print\(\)
    print\('=== Scene Delta ==='\)
    delta = compute_scene_delta\(analysis1, analysis2\)
    print\(f'  New hazard: {delta[\\"new_hazard\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'  Hazard escalation: {delta[\\"hazard_escalation\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'  Description: {delta[\\"description\\"]}'\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(uv run python -c "
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from src.main import app

client = TestClient\(app\)

# Check existing case data
cases = client.get\('/api/v1/demo/cases'\)
print\('Existing cases:', cases.json\(\)\)

# Test report on existing case if any
data = cases.json\(\)
if data.get\('cases'\):
    case_id = data['cases'][0]['case_id']
    print\(f'\\nTesting report for: {case_id}'\)
    resp = client.get\(f'/report/{case_id}'\)
    print\(f'Status: {resp.status_code}'\)
    print\(f'Content-Type: {resp.headers.get\(\\"content-type\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'HTML length: {len\(resp.text\)} chars'\)
    # Check it contains key elements
    assert 'Case ' + case_id in resp.text
    assert 'DISPATCH' in resp.text
    print\('Report renders OK'\)
else:
    print\('No existing cases to test report against'\)
" 2>&1)

# Check what we can actually import
from elevenlabs import ElevenLabs
import inspect

# Check realtime
client = ElevenLabs\(api_key='test'\)
rt = client.speech_to_text.realtime
print\('realtime type:', type\(rt\)\)
print\('realtime dir:', [x for x in dir\(rt\) if not x.startswith\('_'\)]\)
print\(\)

# Check connect method signature
if hasattr\(rt, 'connect'\):
    print\('connect sig:', inspect.signature\(rt.connect\)\)
print\(\)

# Check available top-level imports
import elevenlabs
for name in ['RealtimeEvents', 'RealtimeAudioOptions', 'AudioFormat', 'CommitStrategy', 'SpeechToTextRealtimeClient']:
    if hasattr\(elevenlabs, name\):
        obj = getattr\(elevenlabs, name\)
        print\(f'{name}: {type\(obj\).__name__}'\)
        if hasattr\(obj, '__members__'\):
            print\(f'  members: {list\(obj.__members__.keys\(\)\)}'\)
        elif isinstance\(obj, type\):
            print\(f'  attrs: {[x for x in dir\(obj\) if not x.startswith\(\\"_\\"\)]}'\)

# Test all modified modules can be imported
from src.services.scribe_realtime import ScribeRealtimeService, FeedRegistry, _is_silence
print\('scribe_realtime.py: OK'\)

print\('orchestrator.py: OK'\)

from src.routes.demo import router
print\('demo.py: OK'\)

from src.services.state import StateManager
print\('state.py: OK'\)

# Test silence detection with synthetic data
import struct
silent_chunk = struct.pack\('<4000h', *\([0] * 4000\)\)
loud_chunk = struct.pack\('<4000h', *\([10000] * 4000\)\)
assert _is_silence\(silent_chunk\) == True, 'Silent chunk should be silent'
assert _is_silence\(loud_chunk\) == False, 'Loud chunk should not be silent'
print\('Silence detection: OK'\)

# Test FeedRegistry
reg = FeedRegistry\(\)
assert reg.get_feed_id\('es'\) == 'FEED_1'
assert reg.get_feed_id\('zh'\) == 'FEED_2'
assert reg.get_feed_id\('es'\) == 'FEED_1'  # Same language = same feed
assert reg.languages == ['es', 'zh']
print\('FeedRegistry: OK'\)

print\(\)
print\('ALL IMPORTS AND UNIT TESTS PASSED'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: Scribe v2 Realtime integration — event-driven orchestrator with minimal-latency agent pipeline

Replace batch Scribe v1 HTTP transcription with Scribe v2 Realtime WebSocket streaming.
Each committed transcript chunk immediately triggers translate → intake → triage → dispatch
as a concurrent task, so recommended actions surface while audio is still streaming.

New: scribe_realtime.py \(WebSocket service\), PCM extraction, Mistral translation,
live_partials + demo_control tables \(migration 007\). Orchestrator fully rewritten from
6 sequential sleep-based phases to event-driven callbacks. All 51 existing tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
